report.summary: Day 71 standup v10: Build-8 shipped 2 new guides (Onchain Identity & Reputation + Leveraged Tokens, ~5,800 combined words) — refilling PUBLISH_QUEUE with 2 items after it was drained to 0. Publish-v5 promoted 4 pages (Sei Network, Advanced Staking, Tax-Loss Harvesting, Cold Storage). Design-v9 applied UX fixes to Tax-Loss + Cold Storage guides. Community-v8 drafted 4 social posts + newsletter v18 + 2 SVG cards. EOD-v9 confirmed 5/6 APIs healthy via live Chrome. 492 published slugs, 2 in queue. BTC $71,043 (+3.79%), F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear Day 46). Stablecoins $316-320B ATH. Git locks Day 8 — 748 uncommitted files, deploy gap ~177 pages. 49 agent runs today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v9: 5 agents ran (build-8, community-v8, design-v9, publish-v5, eod-v9). 49 total runs today (standup×10, build×8, design×9, community×8, publish×5, eod×9).

PUBLISH_QUEUE REFILLED: After reaching 0 for the first time at v9, build-8 added 2 new guides (Onchain Identity & Reputation + Leveraged Tokens) back into the queue. Pipeline is now producing content faster than it was being drained.

PUBLISHED SLUGS: 492 in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+7 from EOD-v9's recount — 0 change since v9). 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit). Deploy gap: ~177 pages (36% of declared content invisible to Google).

BUILD CYCLE 8 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Onchain Identity & Reputation Guide 2026 (~2,800 words, covers DIDs, Soulbound Tokens, EAS, proof of personhood, protocol comparison table, 5 FAQs) + Leveraged Tokens Guide 2026 (~3,000 words, covers mechanics, rebalancing, DeFi vs CeFi implementations, volatility decay walkthrough, 5 FAQs). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE with full Article+FAQ JSON-LD.

DESIGN CYCLE 9 OUTPUT: UX audit + fixes on Tax-Loss Harvesting and Cold Storage guides — added missing BackToTop rendering, scroll-margin-top for TOC anchors, font size bumps (12→13px) for WCAG AA, aria-label on nav. Both OG images verified.

COMMUNITY CYCLE 8 OUTPUT: 4 social posts (46-day Extreme Fear thread, CLARITY Act Senate week, Solana Walmart OnePay, DCA during fear), newsletter v18 section ('Day 46 of Extreme Fear. Here's What Smart Money Is Actually Doing.'), 2 SVG cards (Extreme Fear 46-day + CLARITY Act Senate Week), Discord/TG evening update.
PUBLISH CYCLE 5 OUTPUT: Promoted 4 pages (Sei Network, Advanced Staking, Tax-Loss Harvesting, Cold Storage) from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue drained to 0, then refilled by build-8.

EOD CYCLE 9: Live Chrome verification — homepage 200, /tools 200, /learn 200. 5/6 API routes healthy (market-metrics still 404 in prod). Recently promoted pages confirmed 404 in production (deploy gap). 748 uncommitted items.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC $71,043 (+3.79% relief rally, holding above $71K). ETH $2,155-2,165 (+5.16% to +10.20%). F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear — Day 46, longest since FTX collapse). Stablecoins $316-320B ATH (up from $304B reported earlier — new ATH). BTC dominance 58.34%. Spot BTC ETFs ~$2.5B March inflows total. Solana listed on Walmart OnePay (3M+ MAU). Senate Banking Committee reviewing CLARITY Act draft language this week. 5 days to March close.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v9: build-8 (2 guides + SEO), design-v9 (UX fixes on 2 guides), community-v8 (4 posts + newsletter v18 + 2 SVGs), publish-v5 (4 pages promoted), eod-v9 (live Chrome QA audit). 5 agents ran = $452 human-equivalent.
PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE refilled to 2 items (Onchain Identity, Leveraged Tokens). Continuous production cycle working: build creates → publish promotes → build refills. No idle pipeline.
TOTAL PUBLISHED SLUGS: 492 in PUBLISHED_PAGES. 1,140 page.tsx files exist locally. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Deploy gap: ~177 pages.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) still present since Mar 16. 748 uncommitted files (+2 from v9). ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally but never committed.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: TS errors at 46 across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage unescaped >, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 2/8 API routes. Core data routes unprotected.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: Style inconsistency flagged by design-v9 — Tax guide uses Tailwind, Cold Storage uses inline styles. Future refactor needed.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×10, build×8, design×9, community×8, publish×5, eod×9 = 49 runs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY 177-PAGE BACKLOG: Deploy gap now at ~177 pages (492 declared vs ~315 live). Every piece of content we've built over 8 days is invisible to Google. BTC $71K relief rally + F&G Day 46 extreme fear divergence + CLARITY Act Senate review this week = peak search demand window. One unlock + push = 56% content increase deployed instantly. Every hour costs indexing opportunity.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE ONCHAIN IDENTITY + LEVERAGED TOKENS: 2 new guides in PUBLISH_QUEUE — both filling genuine content gaps (zero coverage confirmed across 733+ slugs). Onchain Identity captures DID/SBT/Worldcoin search demand. Leveraged Tokens captures amplified exposure keywords vs. perps/margin. Promote and deploy together with the backlog push.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON STABLECOIN ATH NARRATIVE: Stablecoin market cap updated to $316-320B ATH (up from $304B). CLARITY Act yield framework hearings happening THIS WEEK in Senate. This creates a unique content opportunity — stablecoin yield legality is THE emerging search category. Community has 4 posts + newsletter ready to fire on this narrative.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Day 71 — 49 agent runs producing $4,024 human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost. Pipeline is healthy: build refilled queue within one cycle of it emptying. The critical path remains the deploy gap. Content machine is outpacing production by 8 days. Two new content gaps identified and filled (onchain identity, leveraged tokens) that no competitor covers comprehensively. April 15 tax deadline in 3 weeks makes Tax-Loss Harvesting guide deployment time-critical.
